summary: Completed testing of 4 Community Layer features for Philos Orientation. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) pass. All 4 frontend components render correctly with proper Hebrew RTL layout.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: All 4 backend APIs return correct data structures
GOOD: GET /api/orientation/active-users returns active_users_today (int) and active_streak_users (int)
GOOD: GET /api/orientation/relative-score/{user_id} returns percentile (0-100), direction, and user_actions_today
GOOD: GET /api/orientation/circles returns counts for all 4 directions: contribution, recovery, order, exploration
GOOD: GET /api/orientation/streaks returns users_on_streak and longest_streak_today
GOOD: ActiveUsersIndicator component shows in header below title with 'X משתמשים פעילים היום'
GOOD: RelativeScoreSection shows 'אתה פעיל יותר מ-X% מהמשתמשים היום' with percentile bar
GOOD: OrientationCirclesSection displays 2x2 grid with icons and counts for all 4 directions
GOOD: CommunityStreakSection shows 'X אנשים נמצאים ברצף היום' with longest streak info
GOOD: All 14 data-testid attributes present and visible (active-streak-count conditionally hidden when 0)
GOOD: All 4 sections have dir='rtl' for proper Hebrew RTL layout
test_credentials: Anonymous user - no auth required for these endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 Community Layer features tested: (1) ActiveUsersIndicator in header shows active users count and optionally streak users, (2) RelativeScoreSection shows user's percentile among all users today with direction, (3) OrientationCirclesSection shows 2x2 grid with contribution/recovery/order/exploration counts, (4) CommunityStreakSection shows users on streak and longest streak today. All features in Home tab ('בית').

frontend_tests.Feature 2 - Score message format correct: PASS - 'אתה פעיל יותר מ-0% מהמשתמשים היום'
